article.title: How to Choose the Best Coffee Beans
article.body_html:
Choosing the right coffee beans can transform your morning routine.

Origins Matter

Where your beans come from affects flavor profiles dramatically. Ethiopian beans tend to have fruity, wine-like qualities, while Colombian beans offer nutty, chocolatey notes.

Roast Levels

Light roasts preserve the bean's original character. Medium roasts balance acidity and body. Dark roasts deliver bold, smoky flavors.

Freshness Is Key

Always check the roast date. Coffee is best consumed within 2-4 weeks of roasting. Store beans in an airtight container away from light and heat.
article.author: Coffee Expert
